test.name: E2E Order Successfully

kw.name: Open Browser To Login Page
Open Browser
kw.msg: There was an error managing chromedriver (error sending request for url (https://googlechromelabs.github.io/chrome-for-testing/known-good-versions-with-downloads.json)); using driver found in the cache
Error sending stats to Plausible: error sending request for url (https://plausible.io/api/event)

WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: net::ERR_INTERNET_DISCONNECTED (Session info: chrome=148.0.7778.168) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff646201e35+2e8d45] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff645f2e6c0+155d0] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645c7d57d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645c7a0a4] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645c6a491] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645c6c37f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645c6aa33] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645c6a1fb] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645c69eb1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645c67afb] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645c68242] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645c81836] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645d25a74] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645cffe6a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645d24c63] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645cc9d58] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645ccac43] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff64622dab9+3149c9] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff64622802b+30ef3b] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff64624c872+333782] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff645f4b785+32695] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff645f542bc+3b1cc] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff645f37f24+1ee34] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff645f380b4+1efc4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff645f1bf27+2e37] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffa95c9259d+1d] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffa9772af78+28]
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.doc: This test case verifies that a user can place an order successfully.
test.status: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: net::ERR_INTERNET_DISCONNECTED (Session info: chrome=148.0.7778.168) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff646201e35+2e8d45] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff645f2e6c0+155d0] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645c7d57d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645c7a0a4] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645c6a491] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645c6c37f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645c6aa33] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645c6a1fb] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645c69eb1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645c67afb] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645c68242] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645c81836] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645d25a74] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645cffe6a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645d24c63] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645cc9d58] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff645ccac43] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff64622dab9+3149c9] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff64622802b+30ef3b] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff64624c872+333782] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff645f4b785+32695] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff645f542bc+3b1cc] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff645f37f24+1ee34] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff645f380b4+1efc4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff645f1bf27+2e37] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffa95c9259d+1d] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffa9772af78+28]

errors.msg: There was an error managing chromedriver (error sending request for url (https://googlechromelabs.github.io/chrome-for-testing/known-good-versions-with-downloads.json)); using driver found in the cache
